coreResponsibility.summary: A UI plugin for the Kaltura Player that enables customizable call-to-action dialogs (overlays and toast popups) to appear at specific times during video playback, allowing viewers to interact with actionable buttons that can navigate to URLs or load other media entries.

featureOwnership: Call-to-action overlay display during video playback
Call-to-action toast/popup display during video playback
Timed message scheduling (show on start, show on end, time from start, time from end)
Configurable CTA buttons with URL navigation or entry ID loading
Metadata-based dynamic message content from Kaltura backend
Responsive display modes based on player size (tiny, small, medium, large, extra-large)
Focus trap and accessibility support for overlay modals
dataHandling: Message timing state management (wasShown, wasDismissed, activeMessage)
Player time synchronization for message display triggers
Kaltura metadata API responses for dynamic CTA content
XML metadata parsing for entry-specific CTA content

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Core Kaltura Player providing player instance, event system, UI framework, and media loading capabilities

upstream.name: @playkit-js/ui-managers
upstream.description: UI managers plugin providing FloatingManager service for popup rendering

upstream.name: Kaltura metadata_metadata API
upstream.description: Backend API for fetching entry-specific metadata used in dynamic CTA content

downstream.name: Kaltura Player Web Applications
downstream.description: Any web application embedding the Kaltura Player that wants CTA functionality

downstream.name: KMC (Kaltura Management Console)
downstream.description: Player configuration interface where CTA messages are configured

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura metadata_metadata.list API
externalAPIs.description: Used to fetch metadata profiles for dynamic CTA content based on entry metadata

entryPoints.description: Plugin registration and exports entry point
Main plugin class (CallToAction) extending BasePlugin - core business logic
UI manager handling overlay and popup rendering, display logic

dispatched.name: CALL_TO_ACTION_DISPLAYED
dispatched.description: Fired when a CTA message is displayed (overlay or toast)

dispatched.name: CALL_TO_ACTION_BUTTON_CLICK
dispatched.description: Fired when a user clicks a CTA button
